prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about solar flares than social media does.
Context visual: Solar flares are massive bursts of energy from the sun. They can impact communication and power on Earth.
Escalation visual: But did you know they’re caused by magnetic field lines snapping? This can release the energy of millions of atomic bomb
Evidence visual: When these flares erupt, they can send bursts of solar particles towards Earth, affecting satellites.
